summary: SE Dashboard 'Assigned Contractors' view testing completed. Fixed backend bug where SE work orders endpoint was querying wrong collection. All features working: contractor list view, drill-down to stages, amount breakdown, Request Payment/Finish Stage buttons, back navigation. Backend E2E tests pass (21/21).

fixed.issue: Was querying 'work_orders' collection instead of 'project_work_orders'. Also was using 'assigned_to' field instead of 'site_engineer_assignments' collection.
fixed.fix: Updated to query 'project_work_orders' collection and use 'site_engineer_assignments' for project filtering. Added order_type, work_order_number, total_amount field mapping.

seed_data_creation: Used existing work orders from iteration_134 (Kumar Painters, Kumar Masonry Works)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SE Dashboard Work Orders tab now shows 'Assigned Contractors' view correctly. Backend endpoint /api/site-engineer/work-orders was fixed to query project_work_orders collection using site_engineer_assignments for project filtering. All 21 backend tests pass. UI verified: contractor list with icon/name/badge/stages/amount/chevron, drill-down to stages with Released/Pending/Balance breakdown, Request Payment and Finish Stage buttons on active stages, Back to Contractors navigation.

frontend_ui.contractor_cards: PASS - 2 contractor cards displayed (Kumar Painters, Kumar Masonry Works)
frontend_ui.contractor_card_elements: PASS - icon, name, work type badge (Labour), X/Y active stages, total amount, chevron arrow
frontend_ui.drill_down_to_stages: PASS - clicking contractor shows stages detail view
frontend_ui.stage_cards: PASS - 4 stage cards with stage number badge, name, amount

backend_apis.se_work_orders_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/site-engineer/work-orders returns work orders from project_work_orders collection
backend_apis.approval_pipeline: PASS - PM → Planning → Accountant approval flow
backend_apis.finish_stage: PASS - PATCH .../finish marks stage as finished
backend_apis.validation_rules: PASS - balance validation, pending requests check, finished stage check
